name: UploadCheck.app
short_description: Quality check videos, podcasts, and clips before upload.
long_description: UploadCheck gives Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and MCP-capable creator agents a deterministic pre-upload QC loop. Agents can run a media check, fetch timestamped flags, repair only reachable issues, and rerun before claiming an export is upload-ready.

billing_boundary.model_backed_review: internal capture-rate testing or separately sold add-on

privacy_and_safety: Local MCP clients read local media only to send it to the hosted UploadCheck API.
Responses expose sanitized media-ingress metadata and never expose temporary server file paths.
Workspace API keys are returned once and stored hashed.
Abuse limits fail fast before QC compute or storage spend.
Owner spend alerts are recorded and emailed through Resend when billable extra-minute spend crosses the subscription value; COGS remains stored as audit context.
submission_evidence: Registry proof that @drantoniou/uploadcheck and @drantoniou/uploadcheck-mcp are published.
Read-only npm publish preflight proof from npm run npm-publish:preflight.
Hosted /mcp-install.json proof from npm run live-mcp-install:verify after Render redeploy.
Paid workspace API-key proof from hosted QC job creation through report fetch.
Checkout proof from configured Lemon Squeezy checkout URLs or Creator, Studio, and Network variants.
Webhook proof that X-Signature HMAC-SHA256 is verified with UPLOADCHECK_LEMONSQUEEZY_WEBHOOK_SECRET before API-key provisioning.
Abuse-limit proof that over-limit usage blocks before QC compute and records operator-reviewable abuse events.
Spend-alert proof that GET /v1/spend-alerts returns a Resend-backed alert after billable extra-minute spend crosses subscription value, with COGS retained as audit context.
Billing policy proof that included minutes reset monthly and do not roll over.
Public npm MCP client evidence from Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor using workspace API keys, captured in docs/private-mcp-beta-evidence-template.json.
No-public-oracle proof that package files, MCP manifests, README copy, and Directory copy do not expose gemini_watch, omni_watch, qwen, anthropic_fallback_oracle, or deep_ai_review as customer tools.

connector_decision.reason: MCP/API distribution is the current product-agent channel; connector review waits for hosted HTTPS MCP, account binding, report UX, abuse controls, and production cost evidence.
connector_decision.next_channel: Anthropic Directory after public npm MCP install proof

submission_blockers: Configure checkout URLs or Lemon Squeezy Creator, Studio, and Network variants.
Pass npm run saas-basics:verify against the current checkout, usage-limit, API-key, and Resend spend-alert code.
Capture paid workspace API-key proof from hosted QC job creation through report fetch.
Capture public npm MCP client evidence from Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor in docs/private-mcp-beta-evidence-template.json.
